user.title: BiblioCommons Library
user.description: Enter your library's BiblioCommons subdomain and your account credentials. Find your library's subdomain at [bibliocommons.com/libraries-we-work-with]({libraries_url}) — it is the part before `.bibliocommons.com` in your catalog URL (e.g. `krl` for Kitsap Regional Library).

error.invalid_auth: Invalid credentials. Check your card number and PIN.
error.cannot_connect: Could not reach the library catalog. Check the subdomain and your network connection.

abort.already_configured: This library account is already configured.

assign_item.name: Assign Item to Person
assign_item.description: Assign a checked-out item to a household member. Automatically removed when the item is returned.

checkout_id.name: Checkout ID
checkout_id.description: Found in the 'items' attribute of the Items Checked Out sensor.

person.name: Person
person.description: Name of the household member who has this item.

unassign_item.name: Unassign Item
unassign_item.description: Remove the household assignment from a checked-out item.

checkout_id.name: Checkout ID
checkout_id.description: Found in the 'items' attribute of the Items Checked Out sensor.
